reviews.review_text: Food is amazing other than the guy not being able to fold our burrito correctly. I think he was new. 🤔 But I still appreciated him for making our food out was very good!
Absolutely love this place. All Los Tres are the best.
Loved the food and the kind lady working the front. Thank you for the great day out 😊
